**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Zhonglin Electric Co., Ltd. exhibits the operational profile of an asset-light mechanical and electrical (M&E) engineering contractor rather than a physical manufacturer. Despite a fully paid-in capital of 10 million RMB, the company's insured employee data is completely missing (`null`), and its registered address is an office room on the 28th floor of a commercial building (Room 2802, No. 300 Zhongshan East Road). This renders any claims of physical 'electrical product manufacturing' impossible. A review of its former name, 'Jiangsu Zhonglin Construction Engineering Co.', reveals its true corporate DNA: it is a construction and installation shell. It leverages its capital to bid on intelligent building, fire safety, and MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing) installation projects, outsourcing the manual labor and procuring hardware from external suppliers.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 73)
Operational Status: ACTIVE (ON PAPER) / ASSET-LIGHT ENGINEERING CONTRACTOR
